source: SQA Attainment Statistics (national pass rates at Higher) combined with typical progression analysis from Scottish secondary schools. Percentages shown are indicative; actual outcomes vary by school and cohort.
notes: Pass rate at Higher = proportion of candidates who achieve a grade A, B, or C at Higher. Higher entry typically requires a B or better at National 5 in the same or a closely related subject. Figures are rounded. The N5 grade is the best single predictor of Higher outcome, but prior attainment, school support, and individual effort all matter. Where figures could not be verified against a published SQA source, they are flagged needs_verification.

subjects.subject: Mathematics
subjects.notes: Higher Maths has one of the largest gaps between N5 grade bands. A C at N5 Maths is a well-documented risk marker for Higher failure.

subjects.subject: English
subjects.notes: Higher English pass rate is generally higher than Maths for equivalent N5 grades due to the subject's essay-based assessment giving more recovery opportunities.

subjects.subject: Chemistry
subjects.notes: Higher Chemistry has a significant content jump from N5. A B or better at N5 is the typical minimum for confident progression.

subjects.subject: Physics
subjects.notes: Higher Physics has a similar progression profile to Chemistry. Strong N5 Maths is also a factor for Higher Physics outcomes.

subjects.subject: Biology
subjects.notes: Higher Biology has a slightly gentler progression than Chemistry or Physics due to more content being memorisation-led.

subjects.subject: History
subjects.notes: Higher History pass rates are generally high. Essay technique developed at N5 transfers well.

subjects.subject: Modern Studies
subjects.notes: Higher Modern Studies has one of the highest pass rates among essay-based subjects.

subjects.subject: Geography
subjects.notes: Higher Geography builds directly on N5 content plus fieldwork-based assessment.

subjects.subject: Business Management
subjects.notes: Higher Business Management has one of the highest pass rates of any Higher subject.

subjects.subject: Computing Science
subjects.notes: Higher Computing Science includes programming-heavy units that benefit from consistent practice over the year.

subjects.subject: French
subjects.notes: Higher Modern Languages depend heavily on sustained independent study; N5 grade is a moderate predictor.

subjects.subject: Spanish
subjects.notes: Similar profile to Higher French. Grade distribution at Higher is slightly more generous than French.
